settings.text: Inspired by travel, color, and effortless femininity, we design resort wear, athleisure, lingerie, and shapewear that celebrate the body while remaining comfortable for everyday life. Our pieces are vibrant and expressive, made for the modern woman who dresses instinctively and lives unapologetically. Because confidence rarely lives in beige.

settings.event_1_description: Founded in 2004 by Mr. Haroon Chaudhary, Body Figure India began under Limra Creations Pvt. Ltd., growing into a Pan-India brand with in-house manufacturing and a strong focus on quality craftsmanship.
settings.event_2_description: Mohammad Daud joined to lead manufacturing and offline operations. Customers returned, and Body Figure rebuilt its presence in the offline market.
settings.event_3_description: With the passing of Mr. Haroon Chaudhary, everything changed. Offline distribution paused, payments stalled, and profits disappeared. For nearly three years, Body Figure ran on grit alone. Affan Chaudhary began building the brand online through e-commerce while Mohammad Daud kept production steady, determined to carry forward their father’s legacy.
settings.event_4_description: Affan met Josh Rementilla in Delhi during a spontaneous photoshoot with his friends. What began as curiosity turned into conversation. The brand had never defined its creative direction or identity before. As their friendship grew, Affan shared the story of Body Figure. Josh at first showed no interest, and Affan was unaware that this meeting would quietly change everything.
settings.event_5_description: A trip to Rajasthan with Josh and his partner Sasha (featured in many of the brand photoshoots) became the brand’s first unplanned business trip. Affan did not expect it, he thought he just wanted a vacation with friends. He barely knew Josh’s professional background. But with six years in marketing and experience in graphic design, web development, and photography, Josh’s creative vision felt aligned. The possibility of a new direction became clear.
settings.event_6_description: Affan later traveled to Goa to visit Josh and Sasha, and the difference was immediate. The pace was slower, the energy freer. Women dressed without judgment, led businesses, created art, worked from cafés by the sea. Laidback culture did not reduce ambition, it created clarity and space to think. Another photoshoot followed, solidifying the future of Body Figure India and shaping plans for a new website, refined marketing, and the summer collection.
settings.event_7_description: After Josh's return to India, he and Affan began working closely on product launches and long term strategy. Seeing both the struggles and potential of Body Figure, Josh committed to rebuilding the brand with a global outlook. Together, they introduced a digital first growth model, community driven collaborations, and referral based expansion.
settings.event_8_description: Body Figure India relaunched with a new website and renewed focus. The brand began shifting away from traditional offline distribution, concentrating instead on digital growth and product development tailored to the fast evolving Indian womenswear market.
settings.event_9_description: Body Figure India continues to serve both offline and online customers, while gradually shifting its focus toward digital growth. The brand aims to design and launch thoughtfully crafted collections that respond to the fast evolving needs of modern Indian women.
settings.event_10_description: With stronger online presence and clearer creative direction, the goal is to build a community driven, locally relevant womenswear label rooted in comfort, confidence, and fabric expertise. Looking ahead, Body Figure India will expand digitally, launch thoughtful collections, and grow into a brand defined by innovation, sustainability, and purpose.

settings.text: If you believe in fresh ideas, shared growth, and shaping something from the ground up, there’s space here for you. Create with us, earn with us.
Across Delhi, we find bold thinkers with fresh ideas. We listen to their vision and turn it into collections that move from concept to reality.
Our factory is fully equipped to turn ideas into finished garments. We invite creatives to step inside, collaborate with us, and be part of the entire process.
We believe in co-creation, not gatekeeping. If you are bold enough to step in, your ideas do not just get produced. They get paid.
Be the first to know about upcoming collections and special offers.
We're changing the fashion industry one step at a time
We do not believe creativity should wait for permission. We believe in access. We believe in opportunity.
Make your mark as a young designer

We are not looking for people with diplomas or formal training. We are looking for visionaries. Some of the best ideas come from those never given a chance. If you have perspective and courage, this is your moment.
By bridging untapped talent with real production, we create more than clothing. We create momentum. We create visibility.
Starting something new is scary. We know the doubts and the obstacles are real. That’s why we lead with patience and support. You won’t be doing this alone.
